title: What 100K+ detections taught us about live trading tools
author: ChartSage
selftext:
We just crossed 100K+ detections on ChartScout, and one thing became obvious pretty fast: live trading tools are judged very differently from backtests.

A pattern can look great in theory and still feel weak in practice if the display is hard to read or the signal doesn’t feel strong enough. That’s why we’ve been spending so much time improving the output instead of just adding more detections.

We also launched a 7-day Pro free trial so people can test it on their own charts. And for teams or heavier users, there’s now a $499 Enterprise plan too.

The biggest lesson so far has been that clarity matters just as much as the detection itself.
